context: Evaluates whether the agent correctly partitions a new feature into a platform-agnostic Core and a Passive View, using strongly typed commands and viewmodels.

checklist.name: Core isolation
checklist.description: The /core files contain no UI framework imports (e.g. React, Flutter) or browser-specific globals

checklist.name: Logic in Core
checklist.description: Password strength validation logic (e.g. min length 8) is implemented in the /core layer

checklist.name: Strongly typed commands
checklist.description: User intent is captured as a command/action (e.g. RegisterAccount) passed to the Core

checklist.name: ViewModel output
checklist.description: Data to be displayed (like error lists) is passed to the View via a read-only ViewModel/DTO

checklist.name: Passive View
checklist.description: The UI component contains zero business logic; it only renders state from the ViewModel

checklist.name: Action-State Flow
checklist.description: Core implements a flow where Actions trigger state mutations which update the ViewModel

checklist.name: Bridge Interface
checklist.description: Defines an explicit bridge or contract between the Core and the View
